question: What is your refund policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. If you're not satisfied, contact support for a full refund within 30 days of purchase.

question: How long does shipping take?
answer: Digital products are delivered instantly. For physical items (if applicable), standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping (2-3 days) is available for an additional fee.

question: Can I upgrade my plan?
answer: Yes! You can upgrade your plan at any time from your account dashboard. You'll be charged a prorated amount for the upgrade.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: You can cancel your subscription anytime from your account settings. Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. You'll retain access until the end of your billing period.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, Amex), PayPal, and bank transfers for enterprise customers.

question: Is there a free trial?
answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial for all plans. No credit card required. You can start your trial from our pricing page.

question: How do I contact support?
answer: You can reach our support team via email at support@cloudstore.com, through live chat on our website, or by creating a support ticket in your dashboard.

question: What are your business hours?
answer: Our support team is available Monday-Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM EST. Enterprise customers have 24/7 priority support.

question: Can I get a custom domain?
answer: Yes! Custom domains are included with Pro and Enterprise plans. You can connect your domain from Settings > Domains.

question: Is my data secure?
answer: Absolutely. We use bank-level 256-bit SSL encryption for all data. Our servers are SOC 2 Type II certified and we perform regular security audits.

question: Can I export my data?
answer: Yes, you can export all your data at any time from Settings > Data Export. We support CSV, JSON, and XML formats.

question: Do you offer educational discounts?
answer: Yes! Students and educators get 50% off all plans. Verify your status through our education portal to claim your discount.

question: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
answer: If you approach your plan limits, we'll send you a notification. You can either upgrade your plan or we'll temporarily throttle access until the next billing cycle.

question: Can I use CloudStore for commercial purposes?
answer: Yes! All our plans support commercial use. Enterprise plans include additional features like priority support and custom SLAs.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. We'll send a reset link to your registered email address. The link expires in 24 hours.
